about_desc: An honest story about burnout, red notifications, and the search for sanity in a digital world.
atomic_cta_desc: Join thousands of users who have stopped setting impossible goals and started building unbreakable systems.
atomic_cta_note: No credit card required. Free forever for individuals.
atomic_feat_1_desc: See your consistency mapped out in a beautiful GitHub-style grid. A quick glance is all you need to know if you're on track.
atomic_feat_2_desc: Turn overwhelming 1-year goals into tiny actionable steps that you can tick off daily without feeling intimidated.
atomic_hero_desc: Success is the product of daily habits, not once-in-a-lifetime transformations. Build a system that makes being 1% better every day inevitable.
atomic_meta_desc: Build systems, not just goals. Transform 1% daily improvements into massive lifetime results.
atomic_meta_og_desc: Stop relying on motivation. Build a productivity system that runs on autopilot.
atomic_meta_og_title: Master Your Habits with The Atomic System
atomic_mockup_desc: If you get 1% better each day for one year, you'll end up 37 times better by the time you're done.
atomic_prob_1_desc: Relying on sheer willpower is exhausting. When you're tired, goals don't matter.
atomic_prob_2_desc: Both winners and losers have the same goals. The difference is the system they use.
atomic_prob_desc: Why New Year's Resolutions fail by February.
atomic_sol_desc: How OneForMind helps you compound your daily efforts.
atomic_step_1_desc: Track your habits visually. Don't break the chain. The grid is your new identity.
atomic_step_2_desc: Break massive goals into micro-milestones. Start so small you can't fail.
atomic_step_3_desc: Watch your financial ledger grow as a direct result of the habits you kept today.

blank_compare_desc: Why a dedicated OS beats a box of lego blocks.
blank_cta_desc: Your life is not a database project. Use a tool that respects your time.
blank_cycle_1_desc: You open a blank page. 'I will build the perfect system,' you tell yourself.
blank_cycle_2_desc: 5 hours later, you're still watching tutorials on how to link databases and fix formulas.
blank_cycle_3_desc: The system is too complex to use on mobile. You stop using it after 3 days.
blank_cycle_desc: Why starting from scratch is actually procrastination.
blank_hero_desc: Blank pages (like Notion or Excel) force you to build your own apps. You waste hours tweaking fonts, colors, and formulas instead of actually hitting your goals.
blank_meta_desc: Stop spending hours designing dashboards. Use a system that works out of the box. Compare OneForMind with blank workspace tools.
blank_meta_og_desc: Don't spend 10 hours building a tracker just to use it for 10 minutes. Get a real system.
blank_meta_og_title: You are not a UI Designer. Stop pretending.
blank_meta_title: Notion & Excel vs OneForMind — Stop Building Tools
blank_prob_desc: It feels productive to design a perfect dashboard. But it's just procrastination in disguise. When the formula breaks, your productivity breaks.
blank_sol_box_desc:
In Notion, you have to build the database, relations, and views.
OneForMind is ready the second you sign up.
blank_sol_desc: You shouldn't need a PhD in formulas to track your habits. OneForMind gives you a proven structure so you can focus on execution, not configuration.

brain_feat_2_desc: A private sanctuary to dump emotional baggage, untangle your overthinking, and track your daily mental state.

brain_meta_desc: Offload your cognitive burden. Dump your thoughts, tasks, and anxieties into a trusted digital system.
brain_meta_og_desc: Your mind is for creating ideas, not holding them.

brain_prob_2_desc: Notes in your phone, tasks in your notebook, events in your calendar. Nothing is connected, everything is lost.
brain_prob_3_desc: Wasting peak mental energy every morning just trying to figure out what you're supposed to be doing.

brain_prob_desc: Why you feel tired before you even start working.
brain_sol_desc: How OneForMind acts as your digital external hard drive.
brain_step_1: Throw every random task, thought, or anxiety into the Inbox or Journal the moment it appears.

faq_a1: Absolutely. All your data is securely stored in the cloud. You can look back at your finance or habit history anytime for evaluation.

finance_bento_1_desc: No more late fees. The system will remind you when your electricity, internet, or subscriptions are due.

finance_cta_desc: Start logging your first transaction and track your habits and finances in one place with OneForMind.
finance_cta_note: Secure. Private. No credit card required.
finance_cta_title: Ready to Manage Your Money Better?
finance_feature_1_desc: Know exactly where your money goes. We turn boring rows of numbers into charts and percentages that are easy to understand in seconds.
finance_feature_2_desc: Set spending limits for each category. We'll warn you if you're getting close, so you can save more for what matters.
finance_hero_desc: Track every transaction, monitor monthly budgets, and hit your financial goals without dealing with complex Excel spreadsheets.
finance_meta_desc: Track expenses, manage budgets, and monitor your finances easily in one app.
finance_meta_og_desc: Track expenses, manage budgets, and monitor your finances easily.
finance_privacy_desc: Financial information is highly sensitive. OneForMind was built with privacy in mind from day one, so you can track your money with peace of mind.
finance_privacy_point_1_desc: Your transaction data is encrypted in our database.
finance_privacy_point_2_desc: We do not ask for PINs or direct connections to your real bank accounts.
finance_privacy_point_3_desc: We never sell your financial data to third parties.
finance_prob_1_desc: Your salary comes in and quickly vanishes, and you have no idea where it all went.
finance_prob_2_desc: Constantly running out of money before the next payday because there are no spending limits.
finance_prob_3_desc: You need a simple tracker, not corporate accounting software that gives you a headache.
finance_quote_text: Do not save what is left after spending, but spend what is left after saving.

journal_prob_2_desc: Too focused on problems, making you forget small achievements.
journal_prob_3_desc: Failing to recognize your own emotional patterns that keep fluctuating.
journal_prob_main_desc: Tangled thoughts need a place to unravel. Otherwise, anxiety will take over your day.
journal_quote_text: Journal writing is a voyage to the interior.
journal_subtitle: Keep track of your thoughts and feelings every day.
manifesto_1_desc: Your data is your business. We are not an ad company. We don't sell your habit data to third parties.
manifesto_2_desc: One dashboard for everything. You no longer need to open multiple apps just to log finances, habits, and schedules.
manifesto_3_desc: Anti-bloatware. We only include features you genuinely need to keep your life organized. No tacky gamification.
modal_logout_subtitle: Don't forget to come back soon, your progress for today has been saved securely!
modal_reset_desc: This will delete all tasks for today and start fresh.
modal_reset_title: Are you sure to Reset Today's Schedule?
notes_compare_desc: Why swapping your notebook for an OS changes everything.
notes_cta_desc: Move your goals out of the notebook and into a system designed to make them happen.
notes_cycle_1_desc: You get a brilliant idea. You feel great. You quickly write it down in your 'Ideas' folder.
notes_cycle_2_desc: Next day, you add a grocery list. Then a password. Your idea gets pushed down, out of sight.
notes_cycle_3_desc: 6 months later, you find the note. The context is gone. The momentum is dead.
notes_cycle_desc: How a billion-dollar idea turns into digital dust.
notes_hero_desc: Notes apps are static graveyards for your brilliant ideas. They don't nudge you. They don't track progress. They just sit there.
notes_meta_desc: Standard notes are passive. OneForMind is active. See the difference and stop hoarding ideas without execution.
notes_meta_og_desc: Stop hoarding ideas in passive note apps. Switch to a system that forces execution.
notes_meta_og_title: Your Notes App is Where Ideas Go to Die.
notes_meta_title: Notes App vs OneForMind — Stop Digital Hoarding
notes_prob_desc: Writing it down feels productive, but it's a trap. Without a system to remind you, your "million-dollar ideas" get buried under grocery lists and random passwords.
notes_sol_box_desc:
If you want to "Save Money", a note just sits there.
OneForMind creates a budget, tracks expenses, and shows you the graph.
notes_sol_desc: Stop treating your life like a grocery list. In OneForMind, a goal isn't just text. It's connected to your calendar, your habits, and even your budget.
old_data_hint: Use date filter to see older data
password_security_desc: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.
photo_adjust_instruction: Select a photo, then you can adjust the image position before uploading.
planner_bento_1_desc: Automatically generate repeating tasks (daily, weekly, monthly) without retyping them.
planner_bento_2_desc: Use our built-in Pomodoro technique to maintain concentration and prevent burnout.
planner_bento_3_desc: See your daily habits directly inside your Planner agenda without switching tabs.
planner_bento_4_desc: Easily reschedule tasks by simply dragging and dropping them across your calendar.
planner_bento_desc: More than just a basic checklist.
planner_cta_desc: Design a successful routine, get more tasks done, and reclaim your free time with OneForMind.
planner_cta_note: Instant access. Easy to use. No credit card required.
planner_feature_1_desc: Don't just list tasks, allocate time for them. With Time Blocking, you visualize your day and prevent work from expanding beyond its limits.
planner_feature_2_desc: Not all tasks are created equal. Tag your tasks with priority levels (High, Medium, Low) so your best energy goes to the most impactful work.
planner_feature_2_point_2: Hide non-essential tasks during focus mode
planner_hero_desc: Stop feeling busy but unproductive. Organize your daily schedule, prioritize tasks, and achieve flow state with our smart To-Do List system.
planner_mechanism_1_desc: We designed this planner system to keep your mind clear. Everything you need for task execution is right here.
planner_meta_desc: Manage your daily schedule, block your time, and get important tasks done without distractions using OneForMind's Daily Planner.
planner_meta_og_desc: Manage your daily schedule, block your time, and get important tasks done without distractions.
planner_prob_1_desc: Too much to do, not knowing where to start, and eventually ending up scrolling social media.
planner_prob_2_desc: Tasks pile up because there is no clear time allocation to actually get them done.
planner_prob_3_desc: Forgetting important meetings because you relied solely on memory without a solid tracking system.
planner_prob_title_1: Keeping schedules in your head is
planner_quote_text: The key is in not spending time, but in investing it.
pm_compare_desc: The difference between managing others and leading yourself.
pm_cta_desc: Stop reporting to a piece of software. Start using a system that empowers you.
pm_cycle_1_desc: You set up Trello or ClickUp. You create columns, tags, and assign tasks to yourself. You feel like a boss.
pm_cycle_2_desc: Every task needs a status, priority, and due date. You spend more time managing tickets than doing the actual work.
pm_cycle_3_desc: The notifications pile up. The complex views are overwhelming. You quit and go back to notes.
pm_cycle_desc: Why treating your life like a JIRA ticket kills your soul.
pm_hero_desc: Tools like ClickUp, Monday, or Asana are built for managers to track employees. When you use them alone, you are just micromanaging yourself with expensive bloatware.
pm_meta_desc: Project management tools are for teams, not individuals. Stop paying for features you don't need. Switch to a personal growth OS.
pm_meta_og_desc: Why use enterprise tools for personal life? Get a system built for YOU.
pm_meta_og_title: You are not a Corporation. Stop acting like one.
pm_meta_title: ClickUp, Trello & Monday vs OneForMind — Stop The Noise
pm_prob_desc: Gantt charts? Dependencies? Team permissions? You don't need them. These features just add friction between you and your goals.
pm_sol_box_desc:
Why do you need to 'Assign' a task to yourself?
In OneForMind, everything is yours by default.
pm_sol_desc: OneForMind is a Personal OS. No team chats, no 'assignees', no noise. Just a clean space for your habits, finance, and goals.
pricing_bottom_cta_desc: Join hundreds of users who use OneForMind to stay focused, organized, and productive.
pricing_bottom_cta_title: Ready to build a better life?
pricing_compare_subtitle: See exactly what you get in each plan.
pricing_faq_1_a: Absolutely! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings.
pricing_faq_2_a: Yes, we offer a 14-day full refund policy for our Pro and Lifetime plans if you're not satisfied.
pricing_faq_2_q: Do you offer a money-back guarantee?
pricing_free_desc: Perfect for beginners who want to start tracking habits and basic finances.
pricing_life_desc: The ultimate investment. Pay once, own the entire system forever.
pricing_meta_desc: Simple and transparent pricing for OneForMind. Choose the plan that fits your productivity needs.
pricing_pro_desc: For power users who want deep insights and unlimited productivity tools.
pricing_subtitle: No hidden fees. No complicated tiers. Choose a system that grows with your habits and goals.
pricing_trust_1_desc: Your data is encrypted and strictly private. We never sell your personal information.
pricing_trust_2_desc: Built with high-performance tech to ensure your workflow stays smooth and lag-free.
pricing_trust_3_desc: We ship new improvements and features every week based on user feedback.
prio_important_desc: Must be done, do not delay.
prio_optional_desc: Only if you have extra time.
privacy_consent_p: By using our website, you hereby consent to our Privacy Policy and agree to its terms.
privacy_contact_sla: We typically respond within 24-48 business hours.
privacy_cta_desc: Join thousands of users who trust OneForMind for their daily productivity.
privacy_doc_intro: This Privacy Policy describes how OneForMind ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and shares your personal information when you use our web application, tools, and services.
privacy_export_desc: We don't hold your data hostage. You can download a complete backup of your habits, finances, and journals anytime.
privacy_faq_1_a: No. We have strict internal access controls. Unless you explicitly share an error log with our support team, your user-generated content remains entirely private.
privacy_faq_1_q: Can your team read my private journal entries?
privacy_faq_2_a: Absolutely not. Our business model is based on providing a great productivity tool, not acting as a data broker.
privacy_faq_2_q: Do you sell my data to advertisers?
privacy_faq_3_a: You can delete your account permanently directly from your Profile Settings inside the dashboard. This action will wipe all your data from our servers.
privacy_faq_3_q: How do I delete my account?
privacy_finance_note_desc: We are not a bank. We do not connect directly to your bank accounts. All financial data is manually inputted by you and is used solely to generate personal insights.
privacy_info_p: The personal information that you are asked to provide will be made clear to you at the point we ask you to provide it.
privacy_li_collection_1_desc: Name, email address, and authentication credentials (if not using Google OAuth).
privacy_li_collection_2_desc: Habit logs, financial entries, journal notes, and planner tasks.
privacy_li_collection_2_strong: This data is strictly private to your account.
privacy_li_collection_3_desc: Basic analytics such as IP address, browser type, and operating system to help us debug errors.
privacy_li_rights_1: Access the personal information we hold about you.
privacy_li_rights_2: Request the correction of inaccurate data.
privacy_li_rights_3: Request the permanent deletion of your account and all associated data.
privacy_li_usage_1: Provide you with the core functionalities (habit tracking, financial insights, task management).
privacy_li_usage_2: Send you important account notifications (e.g., password resets).
privacy_li_usage_3: Analyze anonymous, aggregated usage patterns to improve our UI/UX.
privacy_meta_desc: Learn how OneForMind protects your data, privacy, and ensures your security.
privacy_meta_og_desc: We believe your habits and finances are your own business. Read our privacy policy.
privacy_p1: At Oneformind, accessible from https://oneformind.com, one of our main priorities is the privacy of our visitors.
privacy_p_collection: We believe in data minimization. We only collect what is strictly necessary to make the app work for you.
privacy_p_contact: If you have any questions or data deletion requests, please reach out to us:
privacy_p_cookies: OneForMind uses "cookies" to remember your session and preferences (like Dark mode). We do not use intrusive third-party advertising trackers on our dashboard.
privacy_p_rights: Depending on your location, you have the right to:
privacy_p_security: We implement standard industry practices to protect your data. Our databases are secured, and we enforce HTTPS/SSL for all communications. Passwords are securely hashed using modern cryptographic algorithms.
privacy_p_usage: Your data is used exclusively to provide and improve the OneForMind experience. Specifically, we use it to:
privacy_subtitle: We build tools to help you take control of your life, not to exploit your personal information. Transparency is our default.
privacy_tldr_1_desc: We never sell your personal information or financial data to third parties.
privacy_tldr_2_desc: You own your data. You can export or permanently delete your account at any time.
privacy_tldr_3_desc: Your financial records and habits are encrypted in transit and at rest.
privacy_tldr_4_desc: We only use essential cookies to keep you logged in and functional analytics.
prob_1_desc: Too many apps clutter the mind. Scattered tasks, finances, and habits everywhere only become a mental burden for you.
prob_1_point_1: Losing focus due to complicated systems.
prob_1_point_2: Burnout from switching between too many apps.
prob_2_desc: Habits on your phone, finances on your laptop, journal in a notebook. Your energy is drained just trying to remember which app to open.
prob_2_solution: OneForMind combines Habits, Finances, and Planners into one simple Dashboard.
profile_info_desc: Update your account's profile photo, name, and email address.
reset_desc: Please create a secure new password.
seo_about_desc: Discover the vision behind OneForMind. We are building the unified workspace for your daily habits, finances, and goals.
seo_meta_desc_1: Oneformind is an all-in-one productivity tracker that efficiently combines finance management, habit tracking, and daily planning.
settings_modules_desc: Enable or disable features you want to use.
sidebar_pomodoro_alert: Focus time is up! Take a short break.
sol_card_1_desc: Hassle-free daily checklists. Track your progress visually. Green means go, gray means skip.
sol_card_2_desc: Input expenses in just 3 seconds. 'Coffee - $2'. Done. See exactly where your money is leaking this month.
sol_card_3_desc: All the features you need, perfectly integrated. Give your mind room to breathe without fragmented apps.
solve_career_cta_desc: Join professionals who are building their career pipeline systematically.
solve_career_feat_1_desc: A dedicated CRM for your career. Sort by status, track salaries, and never miss a follow-up deadline again.
solve_career_feat_2_desc: Set goals to learn new skills (e.g., 'Master Python') and track them step-by-step alongside your job hunt.
solve_career_feat_3_desc: Job hunting is tough. Use our daily mood tracker and journal to manage burnout and stay resilient during rejections.
solve_career_feat_desc: Everything you need to level up professionally.
solve_career_hero_desc: Stop tracking applications on messy spreadsheets. Organize your job search, prepare for interviews, and grow your career systematically.
solve_career_meta_desc: Transform your job hunt from a chaotic mess into a structured pipeline. Track applications, ace interviews, and land your dream job.
solve_career_meta_og_desc: Stop sending resumes into the void. Build a systematic career growth pipeline.
solve_career_meta_og_title: Take Control of Your Career with OneForMind
solve_career_prob_1_desc: Sending 100 resumes a day and losing track of who you applied to, when, and for what role.
solve_career_prob_2_desc: Trying to manage application statuses in clunky Excel files that you eventually stop updating.
solve_career_prob_3_desc: Forgetting to follow up after interviews because you don't have a reliable reminder system.
solve_career_prob_desc: Why searching for a job feels so exhausting right now.
solve_career_sol_desc: OneForMind turns the chaotic job hunt into a structured, visual pipeline so you always know your next move.
solve_career_sol_step_1_desc: Instantly record company name, role, salary expectations, and date applied.
solve_career_sol_step_2_desc: Drag and drop from 'Applied' to 'Interview' to 'Offer'. Visual progress keeps you motivated.
solve_career_sol_step_3_desc: Use the integrated Journal to script answers and the Planner to schedule interview times.
solve_career_sol_title: Build a System That Gets You Hired.
solve_finance_cta_desc: Start directing it towards the life you actually want to live.
solve_finance_cta_title: Stop wondering where your money went.
solve_finance_hero_desc: Say goodbye to financial anxiety. Track income, monitor expenses, and align your spending with your life goals in one beautiful dashboard.
solve_finance_meta_desc: Gain total control over your money. Track expenses, set budgets, and build wealth systematically.
solve_finance_meta_og_desc: No more financial anxiety. Track your wealth and build a secure future.
solve_finance_prob_1_desc: Wondering where your money went at the end of the month.
solve_finance_prob_2_desc: Traditional budgeting apps feel like accounting software.
solve_finance_prob_2_point_2: Disconnected from your actual life goals
solve_finance_prob_desc: Managing money shouldn't feel like a punishment.
solve_finance_sol_feat_1_desc: Log a transaction in seconds. No endless loading screens, no complex accounting jargon. Just amount, category, done.
solve_finance_sol_feat_2_desc: Set limits for categories and watch the progress bar. Know exactly how much 'fun money' you have left without guilt.
solve_finance_sol_feat_3_desc: Not just tracking expenses. Set monthly income goals and watch your wealth grow as a freelancer or creator.
solve_finance_syn_desc: Because the best financial strategy is changing your daily behavior.
solve_mental_cta_desc: Your mind deserves a break. Start organizing your thoughts today.
solve_mental_feat_1_desc: A clean, beautiful writing interface designed to mimic the feeling of a physical diary. Add images, set your mood, and write without judgment.
solve_mental_feat_2_desc: See how your habits affect your mood. Discover if going to the gym actually makes you happier over a 30-day period.
solve_mental_hero_desc: Your brain is for generating ideas, not holding them. Dump your anxious thoughts into a secure, beautiful digital journal and get your clarity back.
solve_mental_meta_desc: Clear the brain fog. Use our integrated journaling and mood tracking tools to find peace and focus in a noisy world.
solve_mental_meta_og_desc: Empty your mind, track your emotions, and build a resilient mindset.
solve_mental_meta_og_title: Find Your Mental Sanctuary with OneForMind
solve_mental_prob_1_desc: Replaying the same anxieties and unfinished tasks in your head because you haven't written them down.
solve_mental_prob_2_desc: Scrolling endlessly to numb the stress, which only makes the brain fog thicker and harder to break.
solve_mental_prob_desc: Modern life demands constant attention. Without a system to process it, your mind becomes a chaotic storage room.
solve_mental_sol_desc: OneForMind isn't just a productivity tool; it's a private sanctuary where you can organize your inner world before tackling the outer one.
solve_mental_sol_step_1_desc: Open the Zen Journal and write whatever is on your mind. No formatting, no pressure. Just release.
solve_mental_sol_step_2_desc: Log your mood daily to spot patterns. Do you always feel anxious on Tuesdays? Now you can prepare for it.
solve_mental_sol_step_3_desc: Once the mind is clear, move to the Planner and schedule only what truly matters for the day.
stories_cta_desc: Share how OneForMind helps your daily life. We'd love to hear your small wins and big achievements.
stories_cta_note: We'll send exclusive merch for selected stories.
stories_hero_desc: OneForMind is more than just an app; it's the space where thousands of people start taking back control of their lives.
stories_main_body: Building Sharesa Studio while being a final-year student was crazy. Without a system that unified habits, finances, and planners in one place, I would have given up a long time ago.
stories_main_quote: This app is my second brain.
stories_meta_desc: Hear real stories from people who have transformed their lives, managed their finances, and built new habits with OneForMind.
stories_meta_og_desc: Real inspiration from users who mastered their time and mind.
stories_user_1_text: I used to track my finances in 3 different apps. Now I just use OneForMind. Simple, clean, and very helpful for students.
stories_user_2_text: The Planner feature is insane! It helps my social media team coordinate campaigns without the hassle of opening spreadsheets.
stories_user_3_text: As a freelance designer, maintaining mood is hard. The Zen Mode in Journal is truly a mental health lifesaver.
stories_user_4_text: Achieved a 100-day workout streak thanks to the habit reminders. The most tangible life change I've ever experienced.
stories_wall_desc: Love notes and short stories from our user community.
story_1_p1: Our phones used to be filled with productivity apps. Trello for work, Notion for notes, Excel for finances. We thought it made us productive.
story_1_p2: The reality? We became slaves to the apps. We spent more time 'managing' the system than actually getting things done.
story_2_p1: We realized something was wrong. Modern apps force us to run a marathon with no finish line. Miss one task, and rigid systems instantly kill your motivation.
story_2_p2: Finally, we created OneForMind. A calm ecosystem that unites all your productivity needs without the overwhelm.
story_2_quote: We need a system that forgives, not one that punishes.
student_bento_1_desc: Pour out your revision stress or rants into a secure, private journal.
student_bento_2_desc: Eye-friendly dark mode for doing assignments until 3 AM.
student_bento_3_desc: Safely access via phone in class, or laptop at the library.
student_bento_desc: Supplementary features to survive the fierce campus life.
student_cta_desc: A good system separates students who merely pass from those who truly shine on campus.
student_cta_title: Don't Just Survive, Be an Achiever.
student_feat_1_desc: From working on final assignments to building a personal portfolio. Break massive tasks into logical small steps to avoid procrastination.
student_feat_2_desc: Monitor your remaining monthly balance in real-time. Know exactly your daily food allowance so you don't have to keep leeching off cafe WiFi.
student_hero_desc: From final projects and organization meetings to managing tight monthly dorm budgets. OneForMind helps unify all that chaos into one neat screen.
student_meta_desc: Manage assignments, class schedules, and student finances in one place. Stop feeling overwhelmed and start mastering your college life.
student_meta_og_desc: The all-in-one productivity operating system for ambitious students.
student_prob_1_desc: Deadlines from 5 different courses arrive in the same week. You don't know where to start.
student_prob_2_desc: Your allowance or freelance money vanishes into thin air before the 20th.
student_prob_3_desc: Committee meetings always collide with group project times or your much-needed rest.
student_prob_desc: We know exactly what keeps you overthinking every night.
team_connect: Want to discuss features or just vent about burnout?

terms_p_rules: We encourage productivity, not chaos. When using OneForMind, you agree to play by the rules.
terms_p_termination: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation if you breach the Terms.

tos_data_p: You are solely responsible for the financial, habit, and planner data you input. Oneformind is a productivity tool, not a certified financial advisor. We are not liable for any financial losses or decisions made based on the data displayed.
tos_intro: By accessing and using Oneformind, you agree to be bound by the following terms:
tos_security_p: Users are strictly prohibited from attempting to breach system security, conducting SQL injections, scraping data, or disrupting the platform's infrastructure.
tos_service_p: Oneformind is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. While we strive for maximum uptime, we do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or completely secure.

user_desc: The first users brave enough to try this system. The ones reporting bugs at 2 AM and pitching crazy feature ideas. You aren't just users; you're Co-Founders.
waitlist_desc: We're building a mobile app to help you stay productive anywhere. Be the first to know when we launch on the App Store & Play Store.
waitlist_note: Don't worry, we won't spam you. Just launch news.
